auth.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordHelpComplex: 8-32 characters, must contain letters and numbers
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Please enter the security email you used during registration. We'll send a reset link to that email.

auth.resetPasswordError: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

auth.loginErrorDetail: Login failed. Please check your username and password, or register a new account.
auth.registerErrorDetail: Registration failed. This username or email may already be in use. Please try a different one.
auth.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.usernameNotAvailableWithSuggestions: This username is already taken. You can try: {suggestions}
auth.usernameCheckFailed: Unable to verify username, please try again later
auth.usernameReserved: This username is reserved and cannot be used
auth.usernameInvalidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores
auth.usernameInvalidDot: Username cannot start or end with a dot

invalid.email: Please enter a valid email address
invalid.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
invalid.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
invalid.passwordComplexity: Password must contain both letters and numbers

auth.loginFailedMessage: Login failed. Please check your username and password, or

register.emailHint: We'll send you a registration link
register.sendEmailError: Failed to send email, please try again later

emailSent.title: Registration Email Sent
emailSent.message: We've sent a registration link to {email}. Please check your email and click the link to complete registration.

complete.title: Complete Registration
complete.subtitle: Please fill in the information below to complete your account setup
complete.invalidToken: Registration link is invalid or expired
complete.invalidTokenMessage: This registration link may have expired or already been used. Please return to the registration page to request a new one.
complete.submitError: Registration failed, please try again later

virtualEmail.label: AI Email Username
virtualEmail.info: This AI email address is used to intelligently process your information. It's your unique identifier in the Threadline intelligent processing system.

scene.label: Usage Scenario
scene.help: Select your primary use case. The system will optimize AI prompt configurations based on your selection

google.completeSubtitle: Please fill in the information below to complete your account setup

chats.title: Chats
chats.noChatsDesc: No chats have been processed yet.
chats.noConversationsDesc: When you receive emails, they will appear here.
chats.searchPlaceholderDetailed: Search titles, content, tags... Supports multiple keywords
chats.processedContentDesc: This section will show organized conversation notes when available

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.desc: Add key milestones, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm (24-hour format, precise to the minute). Example: "2025-10-30 14:30"

keywords.title: Tags
keywords.desc: Custom tags for search (e.g., High priority/External/Discussion)

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailAddressDesc: Forward once, AI handles it all · Text & image recognition
settings.languageDesc: Specifies the language used by AI when generating summaries, titles, and metadata.
settings.sceneDesc: Select the scene mode used by AI when processing chats. Different scenes use different processing methods and prompt templates.
settings.preferenceChangeWarning: Note: Changing this setting will affect the output language for AI summaries, tags, and metadata in future chat processing. Scene switching affects AI processing methods and prompt templates. The new setting will take effect on the next chat processed.
settings.aiEmailDesc: You can use the system-assigned smart mailbox or configure a custom IMAP mailbox in Email Settings.
settings.passwordResetConfirmDesc: We will send a password reset link to your security email. Please confirm the email address is correct:
settings.passwordResetEmailSentDesc: Please check your security email and click the link to complete password reset
settings.passwordResetError: Failed to send password reset email
settings.loginEmailDesc: Your exclusive AI email for login and receiving messages for AI intelligent processing
settings.noAiEmailConfigured: No AI email is configured yet
settings.noAiEmailHint: You can use the email we assign, or configure your own email in Email Settings.
settings.securityEmailDesc: Used for password reset and security verification
settings.oauthPasswordChangeInfo: OAuth users cannot change passwords. Please use your OAuth provider to manage your account.
settings.subtitle: Manage account, message, email, and external sync settings
settings.accountSettingsDesc: Profile, login method, and password security
settings.messageSettingsDesc: Language, timezone, and message processing scene
settings.emailSettingsDesc: Mailbox routing, filters, and IMAP configuration
settings.externalSyncDesc: Sync processed messages to third-party systems
settings.emailModeDesc: Choose between auto-assigned mailbox routing or connecting your own IMAP mailbox.
settings.emailValidationNotRequired: Auto-assign mode does not require manual validation
settings.maxAgeDays: Fetch only the last N days
settings.imapFiltersPlaceholder: One per line, e.g. unread, from:someone[at]example.com
settings.imapFiltersHelp: Supports unread, from:, subject:, since:, and similar rules.
settings.excludePatternsPlaceholder: One keyword per line, e.g. spam
settings.excludePatternsHelp: Use this to skip clearly irrelevant mail subjects or bodies.
settings.emailConfigHint: Auto-assign mode is for virtual email routing; custom IMAP connects to your own inbox.
settings.issueEnabledHelp: Controls whether processed messages are pushed to a third-party system.
settings.issueEngineHelp: Choose one channel only. Jira and Feishu are mutually exclusive in this phase.
settings.issueConfigHint: Turn on external sync, then choose a channel and fill in the matching configuration below.
settings.issueDisabledHint: External sync is disabled. Enable it first to configure a channel.
settings.issueLanguageHelp: This determines the language used for generated sync content and prompts.
settings.feishuTestDesc: Send a test record to Feishu Bitable to verify field mapping, permissions, and the write path.
settings.testIssueNotSupported: The current sync channel does not support mock task creation
settings.issueEngineInvalid: Please select a valid sync system
settings.jiraConfigDesc1: Fill in your JIRA connection first, then set the default project fields below.
settings.jiraConfigDesc2: Project key and issue type must match values that already exist in your JIRA instance. This integration targets an older JIRA version, so keep field names and defaults conservative.
settings.jiraLegacyWarning: This JIRA integration is compatible with an older JIRA version. Please verify field names, custom fields, and default values against your instance.
settings.jiraConnectionDesc: These values authenticate this account against your JIRA instance.
settings.jiraConnectionHelp: Use an account with permission to create issues in the target project.
settings.jiraRequiredFieldsDesc: These fields should be filled first because they define where the issue will be created and how it is categorized.
settings.jiraApiTokenPlaceholder: API token for the JIRA account
settings.jiraProjectKeyHelp: The JIRA project key used when creating the issue, such as REQ or APP.
settings.jiraIssueTypeHelp: The issue type must already exist in your JIRA project, for example Story or Task.
settings.jiraPriorityHelp: Default priority for newly created issues.
settings.jiraDescriptionFieldHelp: JIRA field name used to store the generated description text.
settings.jiraConvertToJiraWiki: Convert description to JIRA wiki format
settings.jiraConvertToJiraWikiHelp: Disable this only if your JIRA instance expects plain text instead of wiki-style markup.
settings.jiraSummaryPrefixHelp: Text added before every issue summary, for example [AI] or [Threadline].
settings.jiraAssigneeSectionDesc: Choose a default assignee, or let the LLM decide and return a valid user name.
settings.jiraAssigneeDefaultHelp: Used when you want a fixed fallback assignee.
settings.jiraAssigneeAllowValuesHelp: When enabled, the LLM may only return one value from this list. Do not add display names that JIRA cannot resolve.
settings.jiraAssigneePromptPlaceholder: Explain how to choose the assignee and what to return
settings.jiraAssigneePromptHelp: Tell the model which person to pick, and require it to return only the assignee account name or key. Do not return explanations, JSON, or extra punctuation.
settings.jiraComponentsSectionDesc: This is the Jira Components field. You can use it as a flexible classification label, such as feature group or module group.
settings.jiraComponentsDefaultHelp: Leave this empty if you do not want to create a Components value. If configured, the system will use these values as the default Jira Components.
settings.jiraComponentsFetchFromApi: Fetch valid components from JIRA API
settings.jiraComponentsPromptPlaceholder: Explain how to choose the component and what to return
settings.jiraComponentsPromptHelp: Ask the model to return only one Jira Components value, without extra text, bullets, JSON, or explanations.
settings.jiraEpicLinkSectionDesc: Set a default epic or let the LLM choose the target epic link.
settings.jiraEpicLinkDefaultHelp: Used as a fallback epic key when the LLM does not select one.
settings.jiraEpicLinkJqlFilterHelp: Optional JQL used when fetching candidate epics from Jira. Leave empty to use the default search behavior.
settings.jiraEpicLinkFetchFromApi: Fetch valid epics from JIRA API
settings.jiraEpicLinkPromptPlaceholder: Explain how to choose the epic and what to return
settings.jiraEpicLinkPromptHelp: Require the model to return only one epic key such as REQ-100. Do not return labels, descriptions, or JSON.
settings.feishuConfigDesc1: Create a Feishu app, then fill in the credentials and the target table information.
settings.feishuConfigDesc2: App ID, App Secret, and Tenant Access Token come from the Feishu Open Platform app credentials page. The App Token comes from the target Bitable link, and the table name is the exact name of the table you want to write into.
settings.feishuConnectionDesc: Find the app credentials on the Feishu Open Platform app details page. If you already have a Tenant Access Token, you can paste it directly.
settings.feishuTableSectionDesc: Tell the system which table to write to, where attachments go, and how to build links.
settings.feishuTableSectionDesc2: Create the fields in Feishu first, then copy the column names exactly as they appear in the table header.
settings.feishuTenantAccessTokenPlaceholder: Optional if you already have one
settings.feishuFieldMappingsHelp: Left side must be an existing Feishu column name copied exactly from the table header.
settings.feishuFieldMappingsDetail: Right side is the internal field name used by the system. Common internal fields: title = title, description = description, summary_title = original title, summary_content = structured summary, llm_content = LLM-generated content, priority = priority, feishu_priority = Feishu priority, feishu_status = status, email_id_str = source message ID, attachment_count = attachment count, metadata = metadata JSON, engine = source engine.
settings.feishuAttachmentMappingHelp: Attachment files themselves do not need a separate mapping. The "Attachment field" and "Image field" above control where files are written in Feishu, and attachment_count is available if you want to store the number of attachments.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password below
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
reset.passwordRequirements: Password must contain both letters and numbers
reset.unknownError: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
reset.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now login with your new password.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource

notFound.quote: What we seek is often not where we expect it to be.
notFound.description: The page is lost, but truth remains. Every detour is an opportunity to rediscover yourself.
notFound.philosophy: As Lao Tzu said: "The way that can be spoken is not the eternal way."

retry.languageHint: Select the language for AI processing (leave empty to use default)
retry.sceneHint: Select the scene mode for AI processing (leave empty to use default)
retry.forceModeHint: Force retry will re-process image understanding and LLM even if results already exist
retry.forceModeWarning: Force retry will clear all previously generated records, re-identify images and perform intelligent summarization.
retry.retryError: Failed to trigger retry, please try again

billing.title: Plan & Billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription plan and view usage statistics

currentSubscription.title: Current Subscription
currentSubscription.upgradePrompt: Upgrade to a paid plan to get more features and credits
currentSubscription.freePlanDesc: Free Plan - Upgrade for more features

plans.title: Subscription Plans
plans.portalFailed: Failed to open management portal, please try again
plans.cancelSuccess: Subscription canceled. Will take effect at the end of current period.
plans.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel subscription, please try again
plans.resumeFailed: Failed to resume subscription, please try again

downgrade.title: Downgrade Subscription
downgrade.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to downgrade to {plan}?
downgrade.effectiveNote: Note: The downgrade will take effect at the end of the current billing period. Until then, you can continue using all features of your current plan.
downgrade.availableUntil: You can continue using your current plan until {date}
downgrade.success: Downgrade scheduled. Will take effect at the end of current period.
downgrade.failed: Failed to schedule downgrade, please try again

cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You can continue using until the end of current period.
cancel.effectiveNote: Note: Cancellation will take effect at the end of the current billing period. You can still use the service until then.

resume.title: Resume Subscription
resume.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to resume your subscription?
resume.effectiveNote: After resuming, your subscription will auto-renew at the end of current period.

creditUsage.title: Credit Usage by Chats
creditUsage.noData: No credit usage found in this period

creditsInfo.title: About Credits
creditsInfo.description: Each credit allows you to process one chat with all its features

messages.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your subscription is now active.
messages.cancelSuccess: Subscription canceled. Will take effect at the end of current period.
messages.downgradeSuccess: Downgrade scheduled. Will take effect at the end of current period.
messages.resumeSuccess: Subscription resumed. Auto-renewal is now active.

todos.title: Todos
todos.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this todo?

newFormat.keyProcessHint: Enter one key process per line, supports multiple lines

share.title: Share
share.modalDescription: Create a public, read-only link. A numeric password will be generated automatically unless you override it.
share.passwordHint: Enter a 6-digit password, or leave empty to auto-generate a random 6-digit password. You can refresh or disable sharing anytime.
share.viewPageSubtitle: Enter the password provided by the owner to view the topic content.
share.viewLoadingDescription: Please wait a moment while we prepare this conversation for you.
share.viewExpired: This share link has expired or been removed
share.linkExpiredOrInactive: Share link has expired or is inactive
share.passwordPrompt: Enter the numeric password to continue
share.copyMessage:
